items.line_en: Good morning, can you please tell me the Wi-Fi password?

coach.say: Good morning, can you please tell me the Wi-Fi password?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning, / can you please tell me the Wi-Fi password?

items.line_en: Hello, look, it's written on this sign here.

coach.say: Hello, look, it's written on this sign here.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / look, / it's written on this sign here.
Chunk it: I didn't notice it.

items.line_en: Also, I wanted to ask, is it possible to make photocopies in this library?

coach.say: Also, I wanted to ask, is it possible to make photocopies in this library?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Also, / I wanted to ask, / is it possible to make photocopies in this library?

items.line_en: Yes, you will need to provide me your name and address, and then can start photocopying.

coach.say: Yes, you will need to provide me your name and address, and then can start photocopying.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / you will need to provide me your name and address, / and then can start photocopying.

items.line_en: Great, how much do photocopy cost?

coach.say: Great, how much do photocopy cost?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great, / how much do photocopy cost?

items.line_en: The price is 3 cents per photocopy in black and white, and 4 cents per color photocopy.

coach.say: The price is 3 cents per photocopy in black and white, and 4 cents per color photocopy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The price is 3 cents per photocopy in black and white, / and 4 cents per color photocopy.

items.line_en: Okay, thank you for the information.

coach.say: Okay, thank you for the information.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / thank you for the information.
